nasb.text: But if she bears a female child, then she shall be unclean for two weeks, as in her menstruation; and she shall remain in the blood of her purification for sixty-six days.

esv.text: But if she bears a female child, then she shall be unclean two weeks, as in her menstruation. And she shall continue in the blood of her purifying for sixty-six days.

cnv.text: 如果她生了女孩，就不潔淨十四天，像月經污穢的日子一樣；婦人潔淨產血的時期，要住在家裡六十六天。

ccb.text: 如果妇人生的是女婴，她就要不洁净十四天，像在经期内不洁净一样。她因产后流血，要等六十六天才能洁净。
